name: 金句型（女性覺醒）
description: 具有現代女性獨立意識的金句對白，傳遞價值觀的同時引發觀眾共鳴和分享衝動。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: When a woman dresses up, it's not necessarily for men. It's for herself to make herself feel better.
